notableEvents.label: Mike Trout GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Davis Schneider.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ernie Clement. Nolan Schanuel to 2nd. Nolan Schanuel advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez pops out to second baseman Adam Frazier.
